'''√dh-p-th''' ('''kadhapath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:qualitate|qualitate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qualitate|qualitate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √dh-p-th
|-
! Lemma
| kadhapath
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thidhapath || jidhapath || shidhapath || kidhapath
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthudhapath || jujudhapath || shushudhapath || kukudhapath
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thudhapath || judhapath || shudhapath || kudhapath
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thudhapath || judhapath || shudhapath || kudhapath
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thedhapath || jedhapath || shedhapath || kedhapath
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothodhapath || jojodhapath || shoshodhapath || kokodhapath
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thodhapath || jodhapath || shodhapath || kodhapath
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thodhapath || jodhapath || shodhapath || kodhapath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhapath || dhapath || dhapath || dhapath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhapath || dhapath || dhapath || dhapath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhapath || dhapath || dhapath || dhapath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhapath || dhapath || dhapath || dhapath
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thædhapath || jædhapath || shædhapath || kædhapath
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathadhapath || jajadhapath || shashadhapath || kakadhapath
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thadhapath || jadhapath || shadhapath || kadhapath
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thadhapath || jadhapath || shadhapath || kadhapath
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shadhapath
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshadhapath
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishadhapath
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shadhapathnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshadhapathnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishadhapathnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shadhapathshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshadhapathnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishadhapathshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shadhapathro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshadhapathnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishadhapathro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shadhapathmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshadhapathnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishadhapathmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shadhapathsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshadhapathnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishadhapathsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shadhapathng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshadhapathnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishadhapathng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shadhapathya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshadhapathnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishadhapathya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shadhapathyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshadhapathnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishadhapathyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shadhapathnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshadhapathnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishadhapathnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhapathnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhapathnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhapathnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shadhapathnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhapathnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhapathnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shadhapathshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshadhapathnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishadhapathshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhapathshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhapathnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhapathshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shadhapathshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhapathnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhapathshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shadhapathronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshadhapathnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishadhapathronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shadhapathroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshadhapathnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishadhapathroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shadhapathromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhapathnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhapathromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shadhapathmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshadhapathnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishadhapathmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shadhapathmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshadhapathnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishadhapathmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhapathmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhapathnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhapathmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
